title: 7.1.1 North Africa Liberation
description: 30 questions covering the liberation movements and independence of North African countries from colonial rule

questions.question: From what year was Egypt a British protectorate?
Who led the Egyptian delegation demanding an end to the British protectorate?

When did Libya become independent? (Hint: Christmas Eve 1951)

The 1952 Egyptian Revolution overthrew which monarch?
The 1952 Egyptian Revolution was led by which two individuals?
options: Muhammad Naguib and Gamal Abdel Nasser
questions.correctAnswer: Muhammad Naguib and Gamal Abdel Nasser

options: A state controlled by another state while retaining some internal autonomy
questions.correctAnswer: A state controlled by another state while retaining some internal autonomy
